item_titles: Just like Deepseek, China's Kimi K3 is forcing Western AI labs to question their compute advantage
Where I erred in my original post about Kimi and my views on open-weight AI
Kimi: Threat or menace?
Quoting Kimi K3
clusters.summary: 中国公司月之暗面发布Kimi K3模型，其实力媲美西方前沿模型，引发了对AI算力优势及开源权重的广泛讨论。
clusters.title: 月之暗面Kimi K3模型发布引发热议

item_titles: Show HN: AI mock interview tool that scores your answers – free, no signup

clusters.title: AI模拟面试评分工具

item_titles: Show HN: Shikigami, run AI coding agents in parallel, each in a Git worktree
clusters.summary: 开发者推出Shikigami工具，支持在独立的Git工作树中并行运行多个AI编程代理，提升开发效率。
clusters.title: Shikigami：在Git工作树中并行运行AI编程代理

item_titles: AI text detectors struggle when language models mimic an author's style
clusters.summary: Epoch AI测试发现，当语言模型模仿作者风格时，主流AI文本检测器的漏检率高达18%。
clusters.title: AI文本检测器在模仿写作风格时失效

item_titles: Protester calls out Amazon CTO for allowing Israel to use their AI towards Gaza
clusters.summary: 一名抗议者公开指责亚马逊CTO，反对允许以色列在加沙地带使用亚马逊的AI技术。
clusters.title: 抗议者指责亚马逊CTO允许以色列在加沙使用其AI

item_titles: Perforce charges $500 for training training videos.. and it's AI narrated

clusters.title: Perforce被指高价出售AI配音培训视频

item_titles: Wolfram LLM Benchmarking Project

item_titles: AI chatbots reading X-rays can be dangerously confident even when they're wrong
clusters.summary: RadLE 2.0基准测试表明，许多AI放射科模型在出错时依然表现得极其自信，可能误导人类医生。
clusters.title: AI医学影像聊天机器人常给出危险错误诊断
